item.text: The previous `gov-check` blocker is gone, but the branch still does not clear `gov-check`: the current committed tip now fails because `BUILD_ORDER.md` is stale and `just build-order-sync` has not been applied in the committed candidate. I’m finishing the WP acceptance tests so the verdict cleanly separates product readiness from this remaining governance-generation issue.

item.text: I’ve confirmed the Schema WP acceptance tests still pass on the latest tip. I’m appending the rerun report now; the only remaining blocker is that the committed branch still fails `gov-check` because the generated build-order document is stale.
The rerun report is appended. I’m resetting the stale validator gate session again and replaying the FAIL gates for this latest committed state so the packet reflects the current authority result.

item.text:
VERDICT: FAIL

1. `just gov-check` still fails on the committed merge candidate `1d62420f140d2c33632a273e4ce1ed32f88ed939`. The prior Loom stub-linkage blocker is fixed, but the branch now stops on `[BUILD_ORDER_CHECK] .GOV/roles_shared/BUILD_ORDER.md is out of date. Run: just build-order-sync`. Exact blocker command: `just gov-check`. File: [BUILD_ORDER.md](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-VALTMP-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1-1d62420/.GOV/roles_shared/BUILD_ORDER.md).

2. The Schema WP itself remains technically green. `just validator-packet-complete WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1` passed, `just post-work WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1 --rev HEAD` passed, and the acceptance tests covering the required WP work passed at [micro_task_executor_tests.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-VALTMP-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1-1d62420/src/backend/handshake_core/tests/micro_task_executor_tests.rs#L1129), [role_mailbox_tests.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-VALTMP-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1-1d62420/src/backend/handshake_core/tests/role_mailbox_tests.rs#L541), and [role_mailbox_tests.rs](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-VALTMP-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1-1d62420/src/backend/handshake_core/tests/role_mailbox_tests.rs#L576). Micro-task packet+summary emission, mailbox-index validation, packet evidence completeness, and packet scope discipline are not the blocker.

Commands run:
- `git fetch origin`
- `git worktree add --detach "D:\Projects\LLM projects\Handshake\Handshake Worktrees\wt-VALTMP-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1-1d62420" 1d62420f140d2c33632a273e4ce1ed32f88ed939`
- `just validator-packet-complete WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1`
- `just post-work WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1 --rev HEAD`
- `cargo test --manifest-path src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml --target-dir D:\hct --test micro_task_executor_tests locus_register_mts_emits_structured_micro_task_packet_and_summary`
- `cargo test --manifest-path src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml --target-dir D:\hct --test role_mailbox_tests role_mailbox_index_api_`
- `just gov-check`

I appended the official FAIL rerun report to [WP-1 packet](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1.md) and recorded the rerun gate steps with `just validator-gate-reset WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1 --confirm`, `just validator-gate-append WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1 FAIL`, and `just validator-gate-present WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1 FAIL`. This WP is not ready for closure or merge until the committed branch clears `just gov-check`.
